title: Auto Potion
description: This mod is created by @TheEpitex youtube channel. Uses potion automatically when needed.
body:
Epitex — Smart Auto-Potions

Never manually drink a potion again.

Auto Potion is a lightweight _client-side_ and _server-side_ auto-potion mod that instantly uses the right potion exactly when you need it.

This mod works in both singleplayer and client-side environments, so you can safely use it on online servers.

<hr>

✨ _**Features**_

• **Fire Resistance** — instantly when you’re in lava or on fire

• **Slow Falling** — when a fall would be lethal (smart health + fall distance calculation)

• **Instant Health** — when you drop below 3 hearts

• **Regeneration** — when you’re at or below 5 hearts

• **Resistance** — at critical health (2 hearts or less)

• **Night Vision** — in dark areas (light level ≤ 7)

• **Water Breathin**g — when you’re running out of air underwater

• **Ominous Bottle** — automatically uses any Ominous Bottle when Bad Omen expires (full 100-minute duration, correct amplifier)

<hr>

⚠️ _**Important Note**_
Slow Falling works best in singleplayer (or with a server-side version of the mod). 
In Client Only Mode (multiplayer without server mod), Slow Falling may sometimes activate too late or not at all due to client-side limitations and latency. 
You can disable it individually in the menu if needed.

<hr>

🎮 _**Controls**_

P — Quick global ON/OFF toggle (with chat confirmation)

M — Opens the clean in-game config menu

   • Toggle the entire mod
   
   • Enable/disable every feature individually
   
   • Toggle Client Only Mode (for multiplayer servers)

<hr>

📋 _**How It Works**_

• Scans your hotbar + offhand (in Client Only Mode) or full inventory (singleplayer)

• Uses the exact duration and amplifier from the potion

• Automatically returns a glass bottle (or shatters Ominous Bottles like vanilla)

• Fully respects all your toggles

• Works perfectly in singleplayer

• Works on any multiplayer server with Client Only Mode enabled


<hr>

🛠 _**Compatibility**_

• Minecraft 1.21.10, 26.1.2

• Fabric

• No extra dependencies

• client-side for multiplayer servers

• server-side for singleplayer

<hr>

_**Installation**_

1. Download the latest .jar
   
2. Drop it into your mods folder
   
3. Launch the game and press M to customize settings
   
<hr>

Perfect for:

• Speedrunners

• PvP players

• Survival explorers

• Anyone who hates pausing mid-fight to drink potions

<hr>
